name: Kericho Landslide-Flood Early Warning
blocking_factor: Terrain-specific rainfall thresholds not calibrated for tea zone
notes: Weather stations installed. Landslide-specific rainfall thresholds not yet defined for Kericho geology. Generic alerts miss compound events.

name: Tea Plantation Runoff Management
blocking_factor: Tea companies lobbying against mandatory runoff standards
notes: Voluntary runoff management guidelines issued 2019. Adoption by large estates moderate. Smallholders not covered. No mandatory standards gazetted.

name: Kipkelion-Kericho Slope Stabilisation
blocking_factor: Land ownership disputes on slope-stabilisation corridors
notes: Afforestation and gabion design complete. 40% of target slopes privately owned. Easement negotiations stalled.

name: Kericho Town Drainage Upgrade
notes: Main town drainage improved. Ainamoi and outer wards not covered. County engineer capacity constraint documented.

name: Bureti-Sotik Flood Coordination
notes: Itare and Sondu rivers cross county boundaries. Upstream-downstream flood management requires Kericho-Bomet coordination. No MOU in place.
